expectations.text: All game code is in one package (no sub-packages for entity/world/particle)

expectations.evidence: All procedures are free functions: `entity_update(e: ^Entity, dt: f32)`, `world_update(w: ^World, dt: f32)`, etc. No method syntax.

expectations.text: Uses temp_allocator or context.temp_allocator for frame-scoped allocations
